titleStmt.title: SII 27.125: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 125. (A.R. No. 119 of 1937-38.) ŚRĪRAṄGAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK, TRICHINOPOLY DISTRICT.

summary.p: Inner jamb of the Nānmugaṉ-gōpura, right of entrance.

This undated record of Dēvarāya-Mahārāya is in Kannaḍa language engraved in Grantha characters. It registers a royal order (nirūpa) to Chauḍappa, the executive officer of Tiruchirāppaḷḷi, to restore to Uttamanambi, the sthānika of Śrīraṅgam, on a representation made by the latter, certain concessions granted to the sthānikas of the place during the time of Hiriya-Śiruparasa, and in additions, to grant him the village Nōchchagarichi (Nochchikuṟichchi) along with some additional lands in another village as sarvamānya to be enjoyed by him in the same manner as it was being enjoyed in the days of Hiriya Dēvarāya Mahārāya and Vijayarāya Mahārāya. The order further enjoins the pārupatya to execute all the directions pertaining to the temple made by Uttamanambi. The present gift of lands was to be added on to an earliest royal gift of villages yielding 300 honnu made on the occasion of presenting golden horses and chariot (to the god). In recognition of his long service Uttamanambi is said to have been honoured by the king with bracelet, gold necklace and golden pinnacles (kaḷaśa) to his house.
This is published in S.I.I. Vol. xxiv, No. 310.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: ṣrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara ṣrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru ti rucirāpaḷḷiya cēlṛḍappagē nirūpa ṣrīraṅganātha
dēvarasthānika Uttamanambi namma pādda baḷiyal
Aphāra dinatōḍaga sēvēya māḍikōṇḍuyiddhānu nāū Ātananu pālikaḍagavōṅ
galu kaṇṭhamālēyanu cattailṛyaśi Ātana manēgē cinnyādakaḷasavanu cittayiśi ṣrīraṅganāthadēvara pūjaiyanu cēnnāgi māḍukhahōgē Ātagē
nirupakha kōṭṭu kaḷadēvāgi ṣrīraṅganātha dēvara sthānaū sarvamānyavāda kāraṇa kradēvara nirupaḍayāṭṭakhaṭṭinahaḷḷi gaḷigē nāḍugāṇikē
ka
kaḍa bēgāraulaḍē muntādau kōḷḷalāga kkē dēvarāpākrahōgada varanu
dēvara vē māḍukhahāgē kaṭṭaḷēyamāḍi cittaiyisi dēvara Aparanu karaśikōḷalāgi ṣrīraṅgada sthānikarigē hiriya śiruvarasa
(sa)nakāladalu ḍijivitavil
dēyīga vērggaḷau kōḷḷakōḍārēḷu namagē Uttamanambi binnam māḍidamarāgi Āśiruvarasa
nakāladalu hamaryyādēkal
vērggaḷavakōḷḷadahāgē kaḷēyanu māḍūdu Uttamanambigē sarva mānyavāgi pālisi nōccagu
ciyēmba grāmadal
U jivitagā
rigē dabhinada Āūrigēu
nāgi Ā
gē mattōḷam Ūranalu nēlana sēriśi kōṭṭuyitagē Adanu naḍaśibahadu prāku hiriya dēvarāya mahārāyarū vijēya
rāya mahārāyara kāla mōdalāgi yindu paryyantara Āsthānahōṅgē mānnyavāgi naḍadu ba
ttu Āmar yyādayalēkhya Uttamanambi
ja mānyadalū naḍaśikōṇḍu bahudu . Ātanu dēvasthānaviṣayavāgi Ēnōndu kēlasakāryya vabannu hēḷidarēvū pārupatya ḍā
pudu hindēnāvū cittaiyista hēmāśvarathadānapuṇyakāladalū Uttamanambigē varāhamunnū
hōmnnina grāmagaḷanu sarva mānyavāgi yārēyanē
śāsanavanu cittaiyaśi yigrāmagaḷanu sēriśi kōḍuvahāgē ninagē rāyasavanu cittaisidakkē grāmagaḷanu śēriśi kōṭṭa
nimagē nirupa hammāḍikaḷihidē Āmunnū
nuvaniḷaguttagēgē Uttariśi cittayi sidēvāgi Āgrāmagaḷanu naḍavabahudu .

div.p: Digital edition of SII 27.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
